## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Aembit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, calibration articles, and next steps for scaling content production.](https://fathom.video/share/kBMsGeDdyowT38xs21PgKoPZwKotGeDt?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [4 calibration articles are in various stages of review; aim to publish all 4 by Thursday/Friday](https://fathom.video/share/kBMsGeDdyowT38xs21PgKoPZwKotGeDt?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Approval process clarified: Dan to coordinate final approvals, with Ashur providing technical review](https://fathom.video/share/kBMsGeDdyowT38xs21PgKoPZwKotGeDt?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Team to ramp up to 8 articles/week, pending successful calibration and approval of initial batch](https://fathom.video/share/kBMsGeDdyowT38xs21PgKoPZwKotGeDt?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Process established for handling time-sensitive breach/attack content and annual industry reports](https://fathom.video/share/kBMsGeDdyowT38xs21PgKoPZwKotGeDt?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)

## Topics

### Calibration Article Status

  - [Encryption keys vs. access keys article close to approval; Dan to finalize today](https://fathom.video/share/kBMsGeDdyowT38xs21PgKoPZwKotGeDt?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [GitHub Actions article needs code snippet update from Ashur](https://fathom.video/share/kBMsGeDdyowT38xs21PgKoPZwKotGeDt?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Two comprehensive guides need review from both Dan and Ashur](https://fathom.video/share/kBMsGeDdyowT38xs21PgKoPZwKotGeDt?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [David rewrote one significantly off-target article; to be shared via Slack for review](https://fathom.video/share/kBMsGeDdyowT38xs21PgKoPZwKotGeDt?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)

### Content Approval Process

  - [Dan to be final approver for content](https://fathom.video/share/kBMsGeDdyowT38xs21PgKoPZwKotGeDt?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [Ashur to provide technical review, especially for code-related content](https://fathom.video/share/kBMsGeDdyowT38xs21PgKoPZwKotGeDt?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [Team aims for quick turnaround to avoid content sitting in limbo](https://fathom.video/share/kBMsGeDdyowT38xs21PgKoPZwKotGeDt?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)

### Scaling Content Production

  - [Goal: Ramp up to 8 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/kBMsGeDdyowT38xs21PgKoPZwKotGeDt?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
  - [50 potential topics in Airtable for review](https://fathom.video/share/kBMsGeDdyowT38xs21PgKoPZwKotGeDt?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [New topics tagged as "new"; team to mark as "backlog" or "topic approved"](https://fathom.video/share/kBMsGeDdyowT38xs21PgKoPZwKotGeDt?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Focus on evergreen content similar to successful calibration articles](https://fathom.video/share/kBMsGeDdyowT38xs21PgKoPZwKotGeDt?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Handling Time-Sensitive Content

  - [For breaches/attacks: Flag to GrowthX team for potential content creation](https://fathom.video/share/kBMsGeDdyowT38xs21PgKoPZwKotGeDt?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [Annual industry reports: Consider video summary by Dan, converted to written content by GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/kBMsGeDdyowT38xs21PgKoPZwKotGeDt?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [GrowthX to assist with distribution strategies for time-sensitive content](https://fathom.video/share/kBMsGeDdyowT38xs21PgKoPZwKotGeDt?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Dan and Ashur to review and approve initial 4 calibration articles ASAP](https://fathom.video/share/kBMsGeDdyowT38xs21PgKoPZwKotGeDt?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [Team to aim for publishing all 4 articles by Thursday/Friday](https://fathom.video/share/kBMsGeDdyowT38xs21PgKoPZwKotGeDt?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Dan and Ashur to review Airtable topics, marking as backlog or approved](https://fathom.video/share/kBMsGeDdyowT38xs21PgKoPZwKotGeDt?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [David to share rewritten article and other updated versions via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/kBMsGeDdyowT38xs21PgKoPZwKotGeDt?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Team to assess comfort level with content quality before scaling to 8 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/kBMsGeDdyowT38xs21PgKoPZwKotGeDt?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin building content backlog as approval process streamlines](https://fathom.video/share/kBMsGeDdyowT38xs21PgKoPZwKotGeDt?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
